description: Replaces the warehouse boundary definition (outer walls, inner contour polygons) in the geofence. Used when the warehouse layout changes, e.g. after reconfiguration via SLAPStack/FIWARE.

in.name: contours
in.description: New warehouse boundary definition (outer segments, hull, inner polygons)

out.name: success
out.description: True if the layout was applied

out.name: segments_count
out.description: Number of outer wall segments loaded

out.name: inner_polygons_count
out.description: Number of inner contour polygons loaded
